title: Carbide Paint Triangular Scraper with 1 Inch Three-Edged Tungsten Steel Blade Repalce Bahco 625, Hamilton Precision Scraper for Removing Paint, Glue
features: Versatile Triangular Shape: Our triangular scraper is designed with a versatile shape, ideal for accessing tight corners, angles, and hard-to-reach areas in your woodworking or finishing projects.
Comfortable Handle: Equipped with an ergonomic handle, this scraper provides a comfortable and secure grip, reducing hand fatigue and promoting precision during use.

Effective Woodworking Tool: The triangular scraper excels in various woodworking tasks, such as removing excess glue, paint, varnish, or even leveling surfaces, making it an indispensable tool in your workshop.

High-Quality Steel Construction: Crafted from premium steel materials, this scraper offers durability and resilience, allowing it to withstand rigorous use and maintain its edge for prolonged periods.

BRAND GUARANTEE: With over 45 years of Industry experience, Xcalibur Tooling is a UK based manufacturer & worldwide distributor of high-quality woodworking tools with headquarters in Stockport, England. We specialise in premium quality planer blades, bandsaw blades, tersa knives, table saw accessories, router accessories, moulding tooling, and many more woodworking accessories.
description: Product Description Triple-Edge Ergonomic Carbide Paint Scraper Brand: Xcalibur Tooling This Triangular Paint Scraper is designed for precision work such as windows and mouldings. It can be easily stored in a pocket or belt thanks to its compact and lightweight design. For all kinds of scraping on any surface. Suited for window mutins, boats, and anywhere with small or difficult-to-reach surfaces. With the carbide blade, you can strip paint, glue and rust off any base material - wood, metal, cement, plastic. The two-component handle allows a solid and comfortable grip. The narrow front end and thumb indent provide both precision and pressure. The scraper comes with a triangular blade. The blade can be rotated to save money and time. The Xcalibur Tooling Triangular Scraper is very versatile when used with teardrop or pear-shaped blades. Paint Putty Scraper Paint scraper developed with ergonomic design Maximum comfort with minimum effort due to the ergonomic design Designed for precision work such as windows and mouldings Carbide blades suitable for scraping paint, glue, varnish and rust off wood, metal, concrete etc Designed for convenient storage in a pocket or on a belt Xcalibur Tooling - A Brand of Woodford Woodworking Tooling With over 45 years of experience, Woodford Woodworking Tooling is proud owner of Xcalibur Tooling - A brand for woodworking tools & accessories. How we conduct our business is just as important as what we do. Our core values are principles that guide us daily in supplying high-quality woodworking products.
